# StudioSphere Pulse

StudioSphere Pulse is a hosted audio intelligence API and remote MCP server for music producers and AI agents.

## Primary URLs

- Product API: https://pulse.studiosphere.space
- MCP server: https://mcp.studiosphere.space/mcp
- Health: https://pulse.studiosphere.space/health
- Tools metadata: https://pulse.studiosphere.space/tools
- Public repository: https://github.com/notpaulb/studiosphere-pulse-mcp
- Official MCP Registry name: `space.studiosphere/pulse`

## Available v1.0 Capabilities

- BPM detection
- Musical key detection
- Waveform peak extraction
- Free estimates before paid analysis
- One-time checkout for users without an API account
- API-key analysis for accounts with banked tokens
- Status polling for completed, partial, or failed results

## Coming Soon

- Track structure segmentation
- Chord transcription

## Agent Guidance

Always call `estimate_cost` before analysis. Always confirm the user has the right to submit the audio before calling `analyze_track`. `structure` and `chords` are not available in v1.0 and should not be requested.

## Useful Documentation

- Tool guide: https://github.com/notpaulb/studiosphere-pulse-mcp/blob/main/docs/tools.md
- MCP server metadata: https://github.com/notpaulb/studiosphere-pulse-mcp/blob/main/mcp/server.json
